category_sources: Official GitHub README says Sparkey is a simple constant key/value storage library for read-heavy systems with infrequent large bulk inserts.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and source_facts.name identify the project as Sparkey.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents dependencies, building, installing, design, limitations, and performance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes a constant key/value storage library, C library, and command-line utility; source_facts.executables lists sparkey and sparkey_bench.
